name: Tourlu
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Pound Green Beans, cut into 2-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the green beans, eggplant, onions, carrots, celery, bell pepper, and potatoes in a 5-quart casserole dish.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (except zucchini and yogurt) to the dish; stir gently.
3. Cover the dish and bake at 350°F for 1.5 hours or until the vegetables are almost tender. Remove the lid and baste the vegetables with juices every 30 minutes.
4. Add the sliced zucchini to the casserole and gently mix it in.
5. Bake the casserole uncovered for an additional 20 minutes.
6. Serve with a generous spoonful of yogurt on each serving.
This is an Armenian vegetable stew, a perfect use of summer's bounty.
